description:
Create a multi-level Bill of Materials for a new "Premium Wind Turbine" product that includes a "Premium Rotor" sub-assembly, ensuring accurate cost roll-up.

Raw materials already exist with standard rates:
- Wing Sheet: $15.00
- Shaft: $25.00
- Upper Bearing Plate: $60.00
- Base Plate: $40.00

Your tasks:
1. Create a new Item: "Premium Rotor" (Item Group: Sub Assemblies, Maintain Stock: checked).
2. Create a new Item: "Premium Wind Turbine" (Item Group: Products, Maintain Stock: checked).
3. Create and submit a BOM for "Premium Rotor" (Qty: 1) containing:
   - Wing Sheet: 3 units
   - Shaft: 1 unit
   (The estimated raw material cost should be $70.00).
4. Create and submit a BOM for "Premium Wind Turbine" (Qty: 1) containing:
   - Premium Rotor: 1 unit
   - Upper Bearing Plate: 1 unit
   - Base Plate: 1 unit
5. Save and submit the parent BOM, ensuring the total raw material cost rolls up to $170.00.

Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
